scripts.migration:generate: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:run: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:revert: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:create: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:create
scripts.dry-run: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register scripts/dry-run.ts
